productDisplayName: Doodle Boy D Print Red Tshirts
description: Composition Red sleeveless hooded jacket made of 100% cotton, with applique and graphic print on the front, and fabric tape inseam on the neckline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Perfect for those warm days, this hooded sleeveless jacket from doodle is a great gift for your little one. Pull the hood up when your little one is out in the sun or traveling on a bike, or simple let it fall back in style when in the park. Team this with denim pants and sneakers for that cool, casual look.
